meaning: 澶у煄搴淸娉板浗鍗楅儴鍩庡競]
examples: The concept of the pool villas is based on Ayutthaya architecture.
The reality is naive murderer, Ayutthaya you no one guessed through.
Honda's main car plant at Ayutthaya, north of Bangkok, has been shut since October 4th.
During the 2011 flood, over 300 community learning centres in Thailand were damaged, 106 of which in Ayutthaya province.
In Thailand, for example, the present Chakri royal family was preceded by two others - that of the Sukhothai and Ayutthaya houses.
